title: Step 102: Self-Routing Codebook -- sum-all aggregation failure

content.purpose: Test self-routing: vectors carry learned gate weights. Candidate 4.
content.method: Each codebook vector learns a gate weight. Classification uses gate-weighted similarity aggregation per class.
content.result: KILLED. Sum-all aggregation drowns per-class signal when class size >> effective neighbors.
content.key_insight: Dense aggregation dilutes signal from the most relevant prototypes. Top-k is load-bearing.

constraints_implied: fc015: Sum-all aggregation fails; only sparse selection preserves signal
